publishedAbstract: Creating or updating a NooBaa `NamespaceStore` of type `s3-compatible` against an internal S3 endpoint reachable only over plain HTTP- for example, an in-cluster Ceph Object Gateway (RGW)- leaves the resource stuck. The status reports: ``` phase=Rejected message=Non-secure endpoint works only with signature-version "v2". Please select signature version v2 for namespacestore ``` The same endpoint and credentials work fine when accessed directly e.g. via AWS CLI using `--signature-version s3v4`.
publishedTitle: [MCG] NamespaceStore enters Rejected phase with "Non-secure endpoint works only with signature-version v2"
